sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42398" key="e)riaxqh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρι-αχθής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔριον, ἄχθος</etym>) <sense id="n42398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laden with wool, woolly,</tr_> or (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐρι-, ἄχθος</etym>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">heavy-laden,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ποίμνη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:520" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">520</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
